properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Azaka is not unlocked with this skin. Azaka can only be unlocked by completing Azaka's Procession - Part 2 - the second Variant of the Tomb of the Nine Gods adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

backstory.original: Azaka Stormfang was once a guide who operated out of Port Nyanzaru on Chult. She originally concealed her curse of lycanthropy from the champions, as she has lost many friends to that revelation in the past. Her true self was revealed to the Champions after she valiantly helped them collect 3 of the 9 puzzle cubes they needed to defeat the villain Acererak in the Tomb of the Nine Gods. She was killed in the battle, but was able to be resurrected after the champions defeated Acererak's soulmonger. Now, she travels with her new friends, as a champion.
backstory.display: 阿扎卡·风暴之牙曾经在楚尔特的南扎路港担任导游。最初她对勇士们隐瞒了她的兽化诅咒，因为过去的很多朋友得知这件事后都离开了她。在她对勇士们提供了英勇无畏的帮助，收集到了在九神之墓中消灭恶人阿瑟瑞拉克所需 9 个谜题方块中的 3 个后，她的真实身份被勇士们所知晓。她在战斗中英勇牺牲，但在勇士们消灭了阿瑟瑞拉克的灵魂商贩后得以复活。现在她也成为了一名勇士，和她的新朋友们一起踏上旅程。

description.original: Azaka leaps into the air and strikes a random enemy; 33% cleave chance
description.display: 阿扎卡跳到空中，攻击一名随机敌人，并有 33% 几率使用顺势斩。

description.original: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side for 30 seconds, the tigers attack every 5 seconds
description.display: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。

longDescription.original: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side that attack every 5 seconds. The tigers stay for 30 seconds. If Azaka specs with Lycanthrope Forever the tiger attacks count towards her weretiger transformation, and her weretiger cooldown is paused during her Ultimate. If she specs with Resist the Curse, the tigers' attacks cause enemies to drop gold even if they aren't killed.
longDescription.display: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。如果阿扎卡选择永久兽化专精，老虎的攻击也会计入她的虎人形态转化所需的攻击次数，同时她虎人形态的冷却在杀招持续时间内会暂停。如果她专精抵抗诅咒，则在老虎的攻击未能击杀敌人时，敌人会掉落金币。

description.desc: Azaka is a weretiger. After $azaka_attacks attacks in human form, she changes into a weretiger for $azaka_time seconds, increasing her damage by $amount%$weretiger_description
阿扎卡是一名虎人。当$azaka_attacks在人类形态下攻击后，她会转化为虎人形态，持续 $azaka_time 秒，提升自身 $amount% 伤害$weretiger_description

tipText.original: Azaka transforms into a weretiger after several hits. Her damage increases while she's a weretiger.
tipText.display: 阿扎卡在命中数次后变身虎人。成为虎人期间，她的伤害会提高。

description.desc: Increases all Gold found by $(amount)%. This ability is reduced by 50% while Azaka is in weretiger form
提升所有金币获得量 $(amount)%。阿扎卡处于虎人形态时，此技能效果降低 50%

tipText.original: Azaka increases your gold found; this bonus is reduced when she's in weretiger form.
tipText.display: 阿扎卡使获得金币增加。成为虎人期间，此加成降低。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% if they are in an exterior location
在户外场景时，提升所有勇士 $amount% 伤害
While in weretiger form, Azaka does an additional $(not_buffed amount)% more damage per attack (stacking multiplicatively). Resets when she changes back to human form.
在虎人形态下，阿扎卡每次攻击时造成 $(not_buffed amount)% 额外伤害（以乘算方式堆叠），此效果在她变回人类形态时重置。
Reduces the amount of time Azaka spends in weretiger form by $amount%
减少 $amount% 阿扎卡处于虎人形态的时间

specializationDescription.original: Azaka resists her lycanthropic curse, reducing the amount of time spent in weretiger form.
specializationDescription.display: 阿扎卡抵抗她的兽化诅咒，减少虎人形态的持续时间。

description.desc: Reduces the number of attacks needed to trigger Azaka's weretiger transformation by $amount
减少 $amount 次触发阿扎卡的虎人形态所需的攻击次数

specializationDescription.original: Azaka embraces her lycanthropic curse, decrease the time it takes to enter weretiger form.
specializationDescription.display: 阿扎卡接纳她的兽化诅咒，缩短化身虎人形态所需的时间。

description.original: Didn't we meet in a tavern? Or was that someone else?
description.display: 我们是不是在酒馆见过？还是我记错了？

description.original: Be careful around grappler vines. They're better at it.
description.display: 在擒抱者藤蔓周围要小心，他们更擅长于此。

description.original: You need a leader? I'm but a guide.
description.display: 你需要一名首领？我只是个向导。

description.original: The jungles of Chult are no match for us!
description.display: 楚尔特的丛林不是我们的对手！

description.original: The riches of Omu are ours to discover.
description.display: 奥穆的财富等着我们去发掘。

description.original: It'll do in a pinch.
description.display: 在危急关头还是能派上用场的。

description.original: I found it in a ruin south of Nyanzaru. It's been with me ever since.
description.display: 这是我在南扎路港的南边某处废墟中找到的。打从那以后就一直随身带着。

description.original: Never head into the jungles of Chult without a good sword.
description.display: 要是身上没有一把好刀的话，千万不要踏入楚尔特丛林半步。

description.original: I refuse to transfer my curse to others, so my scimitar is my weapon of choice.
description.display: 我不想把自己的诅咒传染给别的人，所以我选择了这把弯刀作为武器。

description.original: The champions were captured. I was the only one who could stop the Death Curse.
description.display: 勇士们都被俘虏了。我是仅存唯一能够阻止死亡诅咒的人。

description.original: Papazotl was the first cube I found. The crocodiles were easy to deal with.
description.display: 帕帕佐托是我找到的第一个魔方。那些鳄鱼并不难以对付。

description.original: I'Jins cube was the second cube I found. It helped me prepare for my final battle.
description.display: 伊金魔方是我发现的第二个魔方。它协助了我为最终之战做好准备。

description.original: I gave the push for Obo'laka's cube everything I could and almost lost my soul.
description.display: 为了欧博拉卡魔方，我拼尽了全力，甚至差点连灵魂都丢了。

description.original: Why do I still have this thing? I end my hunts and it's just empty!
description.display: 我怎么就摊上了这破玩意？一个猎物都没能装回来！

description.original: It's always good to have a few coins to spare for wary travelers.
description.display: 身上有点钱是好事，这样才可以路见不平掏钱相助。

description.original: You never know who you'll meet when you head into the jungle!
description.display: 天知道会在丛林中碰上什么样的人！

description.original: It always has more room!
description.display: 用之不尽的空间！

description.original: A tooth from my first hunt. To commemorate its sacrifice and my skill.
description.display: 这是我首个猎物的獠牙，这是为了纪念它的牺牲以及我的技术。

description.original: The triceratops never saw me coming.
description.display: 那只三角龙从头到尾都没察觉到我的出现。

description.original: I waited in silence for 18 hours straight, stalking this creature.
description.display: 为了这只猎物，我足足潜行埋伏了18个小时。

description.original: In Chult, trophies from the jungle are hot commodities.
description.display: 丛林猛兽身上的战利品在楚尔特向来都是抢手货。

description.original: I sell these to those who can't afford my guide services.
description.display: 这些地图是卖给那些雇佣不起我的导游服务的人的。

description.original: It has all the precarious cliffs highlighted. I hate heights.
description.display: 这地图上详尽地注释着每一处危险的峭壁。因为我有畏高症。

description.original: I spent months in the jungle as a tiger in order to create this map.
description.display: 我化成老虎在丛林中居住了好几个月才总算完成了这幅地图。

name.original: Volo's Guide to Chult Pullout Map
name.display: 瓦罗的楚尔特折叠地图

description.original: I picked it up from a rather chatty mustached man from the Sword Coast.
description.display: 这是在剑湾的某个爱唠叨的胡须老头送我的。

description.original: If I growl just right, the tigers don't try to eat me.
description.display: 只要我适当地吼叫几声，其他老虎就不会敢对我轻举妄动。

description.original: I'm not a spellcaster, but this mask allows me to cast animal friendship.
description.display: 我并不是什么魔法师，但这面具却能够让我跟百兽们缔造出友谊。

description.original: It's a family heirloom that was stolen, but I was able to track the thieves down.
description.display: 这个家传之宝曾经被盗走过，但我最终成功追捕到那些盗贼。

description.original: I can finally shed my misgivings over my curse and embrace my inner beast.
description.display: 我终于可以放下对身上这个诅咒的不安，惝开心怀去面对内心的自我。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Azaka Stormfang was once a guide who operated out of Port Nyanzaru on Chult. She originally concealed her curse of lycanthropy from the champions, as she has lost many friends to that revelation in the past. Her true self was revealed to the Champions after she valiantly helped them collect 3 of the 9 puzzle cubes they needed to defeat the villain Acererak in the Tomb of the Nine Gods. She was killed in the battle, but was able to be resurrected after the champions defeated Acererak's soulmonger. Now, she travels with her new friends, as a champion.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Azaka is a lycanthrope and switches between human and weretiger form periodically. Her damage increases the longer she's in weretiger form, and she provides a powerful gold find buff while in human form.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Azaka is not unlocked with this skin. Azaka can only be unlocked by completing Azaka's Procession - Part 2 - the second Variant of the Tomb of the Nine Gods adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 阿扎卡·风暴之牙曾经在楚尔特的南扎路港担任导游。最初她对勇士们隐瞒了她的兽化诅咒，因为过去的很多朋友得知这件事后都离开了她。在她对勇士们提供了英勇无畏的帮助，收集到了在九神之墓中消灭恶人阿瑟瑞拉克所需 9 个谜题方块中的 3 个后，她的真实身份被勇士们所知晓。她在战斗中英勇牺牲，但在勇士们消灭了阿瑟瑞拉克的灵魂商贩后得以复活。现在她也成为了一名勇士，和她的新朋友们一起踏上旅程。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 阿扎卡能够兽化，定期在人类和虎人形态之间切换。她在虎人形态的时间越长，伤害就越高。在人类形态下，她能提供强大的金币寻获增益。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士阿扎卡不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“阿扎卡的行进 - 第 2 部分”——“湮灭之墓”战役中“九神之墓”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁阿扎卡。

original.name: Pick Them Off
original.description: Azaka leaps into the air and strikes a random enemy; 33% cleave chance

display.name: 干掉他们
display.description: 阿扎卡跳到空中，攻击一名随机敌人，并有 33% 几率使用顺势斩。

original.name: Mask of the Beast
original.description: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side for 30 seconds, the tigers attack every 5 seconds
original.long_description: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side that attack every 5 seconds. The tigers stay for 30 seconds. If Azaka specs with Lycanthrope Forever the tiger attacks count towards her weretiger transformation, and her weretiger cooldown is paused during her Ultimate. If she specs with Resist the Curse, the tigers' attacks cause enemies to drop gold even if they aren't killed.

display.name: 野兽面具
display.description: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。
display.long_description: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。如果阿扎卡选择永久兽化专精，老虎的攻击也会计入她的虎人形态转化所需的攻击次数，同时她虎人形态的冷却在杀招持续时间内会暂停。如果她专精抵抗诅咒，则在老虎的攻击未能击杀敌人时，敌人会掉落金币。

display.name: 兽化诅咒

original.name: Guiding Hand
original.tip_text: Azaka increases your gold found; this bonus is reduced when she's in weretiger form.

display.name: 引导之手
display.tip_text: 阿扎卡使获得金币增加。成为虎人期间，此加成降低。

original.name: Resist the Curse
original.specialization_description: Azaka resists her lycanthropic curse, reducing the amount of time spent in weretiger form.

display.name: 抵抗诅咒
display.specialization_description: 阿扎卡抵抗她的兽化诅咒，减少虎人形态的持续时间。

original.name: Lycanthrope Forever
original.specialization_description: Azaka embraces her lycanthropic curse, decrease the time it takes to enter weretiger form.

display.name: 永久兽化
display.specialization_description: 阿扎卡接纳她的兽化诅咒，缩短化身虎人形态所需的时间。

original.name: Tavern Brawler

display.name: 旅店打手
display.description: 我们是不是在酒馆见过？还是我记错了？

original.name: Grappler
original.description: Be careful around grappler vines. They're better at it.

display.name: 擒抱者
display.description: 在擒抱者藤蔓周围要小心，他们更擅长于此。

original.name: Selflessness

display.name: 无私

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: The jungles of Chult are no match for us!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领

original.name: Lucky

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 奥穆的财富等着我们去发掘。

original.name: Looted Scimitar
original.description: It'll do in a pinch.

display.name: 战利品弯刀
display.description: 在危急关头还是能派上用场的。

original.name: Trusty Scimitar
original.description: I found it in a ruin south of Nyanzaru. It's been with me ever since.

display.name: 可靠的弯刀
display.description: 这是我在南扎路港的南边某处废墟中找到的。打从那以后就一直随身带着。

original.name: Trailhead Scimitar
original.description: Never head into the jungles of Chult without a good sword.

display.name: 蜿蜒弯刀
display.description: 要是身上没有一把好刀的话，千万不要踏入楚尔特丛林半步。

original.name: Scimitar of the Weretiger
original.description: I refuse to transfer my curse to others, so my scimitar is my weapon of choice.

display.name: 虎人弯刀
display.description: 我不想把自己的诅咒传染给别的人，所以我选择了这把弯刀作为武器。

display.name: 已破解的魔方
display.description: 勇士们都被俘虏了。我是仅存唯一能够阻止死亡诅咒的人。

original.name: Papazotl Puzzle Cube
original.description: Papazotl was the first cube I found. The crocodiles were easy to deal with.

display.name: 帕帕佐托魔方
display.description: 帕帕佐托是我找到的第一个魔方。那些鳄鱼并不难以对付。

original.name: I'Jin Puzzle Cube
original.description: I'Jins cube was the second cube I found. It helped me prepare for my final battle.

display.name: 伊金魔方
display.description: 伊金魔方是我发现的第二个魔方。它协助了我为最终之战做好准备。

original.name: Obo'laka Puzzle Cube
original.description: I gave the push for Obo'laka's cube everything I could and almost lost my soul.

display.name: 欧博拉卡魔方
display.description: 为了欧博拉卡魔方，我拼尽了全力，甚至差点连灵魂都丢了。

original.name: Torn Pouch
original.description: Why do I still have this thing? I end my hunts and it's just empty!

display.name: 破损的袋子
display.description: 我怎么就摊上了这破玩意？一个猎物都没能装回来！

original.name: Coin Pouch
original.description: It's always good to have a few coins to spare for wary travelers.

display.name: 钱袋
display.description: 身上有点钱是好事，这样才可以路见不平掏钱相助。

original.name: Filled Pouch of Coins
original.description: You never know who you'll meet when you head into the jungle!

display.name: 盛满金币的钱袋
display.description: 天知道会在丛林中碰上什么样的人！

original.name: Magical Coin Pack
original.description: It always has more room!

display.name: 魔法钱袋
display.description: 用之不尽的空间！

original.name: Tooth Stud
original.description: A tooth from my first hunt. To commemorate its sacrifice and my skill.

display.name: 獠牙饰品
display.description: 这是我首个猎物的獠牙，这是为了纪念它的牺牲以及我的技术。

original.name: Tooth Earring
original.description: The triceratops never saw me coming.

display.name: 獠牙耳环
display.description: 那只三角龙从头到尾都没察觉到我的出现。

original.name: Tooth Circlet
original.description: I waited in silence for 18 hours straight, stalking this creature.

display.name: 獠牙圆环
display.description: 为了这只猎物，我足足潜行埋伏了18个小时。

original.name: Beast's Teeth
original.description: In Chult, trophies from the jungle are hot commodities.

display.name: 兽类獠牙
display.description: 丛林猛兽身上的战利品在楚尔特向来都是抢手货。

original.name: Crudely Drawn Map
original.description: I sell these to those who can't afford my guide services.

display.name: 粗糙的手绘地图
display.description: 这些地图是卖给那些雇佣不起我的导游服务的人的。

original.name: Respectable Map of Chult
original.description: It has all the precarious cliffs highlighted. I hate heights.

display.name: 楚尔特优质地图
display.description: 这地图上详尽地注释着每一处危险的峭壁。因为我有畏高症。

original.name: Guide's Map to Chult
original.description: I spent months in the jungle as a tiger in order to create this map.

display.name: 楚尔特导游地图
display.description: 我化成老虎在丛林中居住了好几个月才总算完成了这幅地图。

original.name: Volo's Guide to Chult Pullout Map
original.description: I picked it up from a rather chatty mustached man from the Sword Coast.

display.name: 瓦罗的楚尔特折叠地图
display.description: 这是在剑湾的某个爱唠叨的胡须老头送我的。

original.name: Tiger Mask
original.description: If I growl just right, the tigers don't try to eat me.

display.name: 老虎面具
display.description: 只要我适当地吼叫几声，其他老虎就不会敢对我轻举妄动。

original.name: Solemn Tiger Mask
original.description: I'm not a spellcaster, but this mask allows me to cast animal friendship.

display.name: 肃穆的老虎面具
display.description: 我并不是什么魔法师，但这面具却能够让我跟百兽们缔造出友谊。

original.name: Mask of the Beast
original.description: It's a family heirloom that was stolen, but I was able to track the thieves down.

display.name: 野兽面具
display.description: 这个家传之宝曾经被盗走过，但我最终成功追捕到那些盗贼。

original.name: Champion's Mask of the Beast
original.description: I can finally shed my misgivings over my curse and embrace my inner beast.

display.name: 勇士的野兽面具
display.description: 我终于可以放下对身上这个诅咒的不安，惝开心怀去面对内心的自我。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位近战勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
